name: positron-stata-mcp
description: Positron-native Stata extension that preserves the upstream stata-mcp server logic while adopting Positron runtime infrastructure.

editor/actions/left.when: resourceExtname == .do || resourceExtname == .ado || resourceExtname == .doh || resourceExtname == .mata || editorLangId == stata

editor/context.when: resourceExtname == .do || resourceExtname == .ado || resourceExtname == .doh || resourceExtname == .mata || editorLangId == stata
resourceExtname == .do || resourceExtname == .ado || resourceExtname == .doh || resourceExtname == .mata || editorLangId == stata
resourceExtname == .do || resourceExtname == .ado || resourceExtname == .doh || resourceExtname == .mata || editorLangId == stata
resourceExtname == .do || resourceExtname == .ado || resourceExtname == .doh || resourceExtname == .mata || editorLangId == stata

keybindings.when: editorTextFocus && (editorLangId == stata || resourceExtname == .do || resourceExtname == .ado || resourceExtname == .doh || resourceExtname == .mata)
editorTextFocus && (editorLangId == stata || resourceExtname == .do || resourceExtname == .ado || resourceExtname == .doh || resourceExtname == .mata)
editorTextFocus && (editorLangId == stata || resourceExtname == .do || resourceExtname == .ado || resourceExtname == .doh || resourceExtname == .mata)

positron.stata.installationPath.description: Path to the Stata installation directory.

positron.stata.edition.description: Stata edition to use when launching worker processes.

positron.stata.server.host.description: Host to bind the bundled Stata MCP server to.

positron.stata.server.port.description: Port used by the bundled Stata MCP server.

positron.stata.server.autoStart.description: Automatically warm the bundled Stata MCP server when the extension activates.

positron.stata.server.forcePort.description: Attempt to reclaim the configured port before starting the bundled server.

positron.stata.debug.description: Enable verbose logging for the Positron extension and Python Stata server.

positron.stata.autoDisplayGraphs.description: Automatically surface generated graphs in Positron's Plots pane.

positron.stata.runSelectionTimeout.description: Timeout in seconds for interactive execution and console selections.

positron.stata.runFileTimeout.description: Timeout in seconds for do-file execution.

positron.stata.workingDirectory.mode.description: Working directory strategy for do-file execution.

positron.stata.workingDirectory.customPa.description: Custom working directory used when workingDirectory.mode is set to custom.

positron.stata.mcp.resultDisplayMode.description: Output filtering mode used by the retained Stata MCP server.

positron.stata.mcp.maxOutputTokens.description: Approximate token budget for MCP responses before the Python server falls back to file output.

positron.stata.multiSession.enabled.description: Enable the original multi-session worker model from stata-mcp.

positron.stata.multiSession.maxSessions.description: Maximum number of concurrent Stata worker sessions.

positron.stata.multiSession.sessionTimeo.description: Idle timeout in seconds before an unused Stata worker is reclaimed.

positron.stata.dataViewer.maxRows.description: Maximum rows returned to the Positron data viewer command.

scripts.verify: npm run compile && npm run package

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Bundled Stata MCP services require a trusted workspace.
